zh.lifeSummary: 當William John Lovelace於1435年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，他的父親Colonel Richard Lovelace39歲，母親Elizabeth Althea Eynsham30歲。他和Lady Laura Peckham至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1496年9月3日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Lovelace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Loveless  . The spelling is apparently theresult of folk etymology, which understood the word as a nickname fora dandy fond of lace. The modern sense of this word is, however, notattested until the 16th century and at the time of surname formationit meant only ‘cord’ or ‘shoelace’.

variants.name: Loveless
meanings: nickname from Middle English loveles ‘loveless, without love’, probably in the sense ‘fancy free’.
some early examples, such as Richard Lovelas (Kent 1344), may have as their second element Middle English las(se) ‘girl’, ‘maiden’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William John Lovelace was born in 1435, in London, Middlesex, England, his father, Colonel Richard Lovelace, was 39 and his mother, Elizabeth Althea Eynsham, was 30. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Lady Laura Peckham. He died on 3 September 1496, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William John Lovelace est né en 1435, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Colonel Richard Lovelace, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Althea Eynsham, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Lady Laura Peckham. Il est décédé le 3 septembre 1496, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England,: Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William John Lovelace 1435 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Colonel Richard Lovelace 39 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Althea Eynsham 30. Er hatte mit Lady Laura Peckham mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 3. September 1496 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William John Lovelace è nato il nel 1435 nel London, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Colonel Richard Lovelace, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Althea Eynsham, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Lady Laura Peckham. Morì il 3 settembre 1496, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William John Lovelaceが1435年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Colonel Richard Lovelaceは39歳，母Elizabeth Althea Eynshamは30歳であった。彼はLady Laura Peckhamとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1496年9月3日に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William John Lovelace(이)가 1435년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Colonel Richard Lovelace(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Althea Eynsham(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Lady Laura Peckham(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1496년 9월 3일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Lady Laura Peckham. Ele faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1496, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William John Lovelace родился в 1435 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Colonel Richard Lovelace было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Althea Eynsham, 30. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Lady Laura Peckham. Он умер 3 сентября 1496 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Lady Laura Peckham. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1496, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
